11121.content:
"I'm Carly!"

"And I'm Sam!"

"And this, is iCarly!"

The two hosts started off their show the way they did every night. But truth be told, this wasn't any old night. The plans they had for this episode would blow anything they'd done in the past out of the water.

"We've got a very special show for you tonight, don't we Carly?"

"Why yes we do Sam." Carly replied. "In fact, we have a special guest."

"Don't get too excited, it's more of a special than a guest." Sam said.

"Just show them already Sam!" Carly said.

Sam grabbed a pencil case off the red, hand-shaped chair and opened it, dumping the contents into her hand. She walked up to the tripod mounted camera to give everyone a good look at what she was holding: an inch tall Freddie Benson.

"That's right everyone, we shrunk Fredweeb, and tonight he's going to be our little prop on the show." Sam said.

"If you're watching this, you have to help me, Sam's crazy I don't know wha-" Freddie began, only to be silenced by a squeeze from Sam.

Carly jumped in to change the topic. "You may be wondering, how is this possible? To be honest, I'm wondering too. Sam handled the shrinking part."

"Mama knows some people who hooked her up." Sam said with a shrug.

"That's all I've been able to get out of her too." Carly said. "But anyway, what matters is Freddie is tiny now, and so he is going to help us put on an unforgettable episode of iCarly, by bringing back a fan favorite skit...."

1. "The Wedgie Bounce!" Carly pulls open Sam's pants and drops Freddie into the back. He is about to be launched up Sam's butt as she gets wedgie bounced.

2. "Hey What am I Licking?" Freddie is super glued to Carly's tongue before she plays a round of "Hey What Am I Licking?" set up by Sam.

3. "Random Dancing!" Carly and Sam place Freddie on the floor and take off their socks and shoes. They're going to dance around, and he has to avoid getting stepped on.
11121.title: Carly & Sam > Freddie

11231.content:
14-year-old Hiro Hamada was walking down the halls of one of the several buildings of the San Fransokyo Institute of Technology. The black-haired boy had a long day of classes and was eager to get back to the Lucky Cat Café so he could relax and unwind. As Hiro made his way out of the building he turned his head seeing in another room that Gogo Tomago and Honey Lemon were looking at a rainbow-colored rectangular prism. The boy-genius deciding to pop in and say hello to the older students.

"Hey Honey Lemon, hi Gogo, what are you guys looking at?" Hiro asked curiously as he walked into the room as Honey Lemon and Gogo kept looking at the rainbow-colored object. "Oh hey Hiro, Freddy's dad found this gem on one of his expeditions and gave it to him as a gift and Fred wanted us to take a look at it for him." Honey Lemon explained with her normal cheerful tone.

Gogo blew a bubble which popped before speaking "Fred asked us to 'do 'science on it' and see if there's anything special about it, which I doubt there is." Gogo said with a roll of her eyes, doing air quotes while saying the word science. "We aren't even geologists so what does Fred even expect us to do with it," Gogo says waving the prism around in her hand.

"It is not like something is going to wrong, I don't see any harm in humoring Freddy, besides maybe we will learn something about it. If it turns there is nothing special about it we just give it back to Freddy and let him know, if there is no harm, there is no foul." Honey Lemon said, always trying to see the positive in things.

"Fine, we'll run some more tests on it, but you owe me" Gogo sighed as she grabbed some materials from another table as she was considering some possible ideas regarding the rainbow-colored rectangular prism.

"Do you guys mind if I watch you guys experiment on the gem?" Hiro asked with a small smile thinking that if he provided Gogo and Honey Lemon with the company that it would the testing somewhat more bearable for the girls.

"Oh that would be no trouble at all Hiro, go right ahead and pull up a seat, more people are always fun, right Gogo?" Honey Lemon asked cheerfully, Hiro went ahead and set his things down before sitting on a plastic chair.

"No, but Hiro's alright so he is an exception so he can stay." The Korean woman stated monotonously, Honey Lemon sighs at Gogo's bluntness but doesn't let it bother her as the tall blonde started grabbing her own set of materials for experimenting on the rainbow object.

Hiro watched with a small smile as Gogo and Honey Lemon did a variety of tests on the semi-mysterious object. While Hiro would deny it if asked, he had a crush on both Honey Lemon and Gogo, finding both women to be extremely beautiful and amazing in their own ways.

Honey Lemon and Gogo first tried encasing the rectangular prism in a variety of different but safe chemicals, each time there was no reaction. Gogo not really caring about the prism or Fred's feelings tried to cut into the gem, it was at this point it was made known that the rainbow prism was much more durable than it appeared, no matter what Gogo used to try and cut the gem, nothing would work, in fact, there weren't any scratches on the prism whatsoever.

"Well, now we know it is super durable." Honey Lemon said with a smile as Gogo frustratingly slammed a laser cutter onto the table. Hiro trying to resist the urge to laugh at Gogo's frustration.

"Do you mind if I take a look at it?" Hiro asked standing up and slowly walking closer. "Sure go ahead, not like it would change anything," Gogo stated bitterly turning around so she was no longer facing the prism.

Hiro walked up to the table where the gem was resting before he picked it up and then there was a blinding flash of light that filled the entire room. When Hiro could see again he noticed with a gasp that he had shrunk to a mere inch in height.

Where does he find himself standing now that he's shrunk?

1. On a counter looking up at a gigantic Honey Lemon.

2. On a Chair about to be sat on by Gogo.

3. On the floor between Gogo and Honey Lemon's shoes.
11231.title: Gogo Tomago and Honey Lemon > Hiro Hamada

info.brief_description: Easy intro, Character B shrinks around Character A! Can be from Anime, Movies, Tv, etc.
info.description:
I've wanted to make a new interactive for a while, involving characters from all forms of media, and I've found some inspiration through Lover Of All Giantesses 's phenomenal story https://www.writing.com/main/interactive-story/item_id/2141885-Shrunk-Near-Your-...

This story will be a little different however in regards that you will not be shrinking personally, so it's not a first-person story. I'm not trying to make the same type of story that he has simply because it already exists. I'm a big fan of Shrunk Near Your Favorite Girl!

The way Character match-ups work is simple. List their names with a ">" between them to signal which character is larger. The one the arrow points to will shrink, while the other remains normal-sized. 3 inches tall is the maximum height for a shrunken character. 1 inch tall is the average size. 1 centimeter(or ant-sized) is encouraged, and 1 millimeter is the smallest a character can become.

Characters can shrink via Shrink Ray, Magic, Disease, through a certain word, humiliation, or even just mysterious circumstances. So long as they shrink the specified sizes by the end of the first chapter.

I will not interfere so long as you meet certain conditions.

-Chapters must be no shorter than 3,500 characters long.
-No Toilet, Scat, or Farting.
-No Male Giants.
-Do not add to "Reserved" Chapters.
-Spell Check your work the best you can.

I will always take message requests if you have questions about the story.
